description: Tall, graceful beings with pointed ears and centuries-long lifespans, prizing magic and tradition.
subraces: High Elf
Tower-dwelling scholars considering arcane mastery the highest pursuit.
Wood Elf
Fleet-footed forest guardians moving unseen through ancient canopies.
Dark Elf (Drow)
Ashen-skinned underdark outcasts worshipping a spider goddess and scheming in the dark.
Sea Elf
Gill-bearing swimmers building coral palaces and patrolling the ocean depths.
Eladrin
Feywild natives whose appearance and mood shift with the seasons.
Wild Elf (Grugach)
Reclusive xenophobes shunning outsiders and guarding primeval forests with deadly traps.
Moon Elf
Wandering dreamers drawn to moonlight, music, and the open road.
Sun Elf
Proud aristocrats obsessed with preserving ancient lore and arcane bloodlines.
Star Elf
Otherworldly recluses dwelling in a demiplane hidden between the stars.
Snow Elf
Pale-skinned survivors of frozen highlands, carving homes from glacial ice.
Shadar-kai
Shadow-touched servants of the Raven Queen -- gaunt and numb to pain.
Avariel (Winged Elf)
Rare winged elves nesting on mountain peaks and soaring above the clouds.
Lythari (Wolf Elf)
Peaceful shapechangers running as silver wolves through deep wilderness.
Astral Elf
Starfaring wanderers who spent millennia adrift in the Astral Sea, touched by its timelessness.
Pallid Elf
Cave-adapted elves with ghostly pale skin and darkvision far beyond their kin.
Mark of Shadow Elf
Dragonmarked spies gifted with illusion magic and supernatural stealth.
Valley Elf
Isolated lowland dwellers tending fertile farmlands and rarely venturing beyond their borders.
Gray Elf
Aloof perfectionists viewing themselves as the purest elven bloodline.
Silver Elf
Twilight-loving diplomats serving as mediators between elven nations.
Gold Elf
Opulent city-builders whose gleaming spires rival human capitals in grandeur.
Silvanesti
Rigid traditionalists maintaining a magically perfected homeland closed to outsiders.
Qualinesti
Open-hearted kin of the Silvanesti, choosing diplomacy and trade with other races.
Kagonesti
Tattooed wild elves living as one with the forests and resisting outside rule.
